name: Playback Indicator
overview: Shows direct-play / transcode status badges on episode and movie rows in the Jellyfin web UI.
description: A Jellyfin plugin that automatically calculates whether each episode or movie can direct-play on your current device, and shows a colored badge in the web UI. Badges are calculated using your device's actual playback profile — no manual configuration required.

versions.changelog: Fix wrong-status-on-everything: pre-fetch the active session's DeviceProfile via GET /Sessions on startup so predictions are accurate from the first scan; sniff fetch() in addition to XMLHttpRequest; broaden the synthetic fallback to include MKV / TS / m2ts containers; invalidate the result cache and re-scan when the captured profile changes; bumped result cache prefix to drop stale predictions from 0.4.0/0.4.1.

Fix badge appearing inside the favorite/overlay button: action buttons that share a card's data-id are now excluded, dedupe prefers the outermost card root, badges placed inside <button> are swept on every scan.

Accuracy + stability rewrite: capture real player device profile, drop polling for MutationObserver, never paint badges on non-playable items, atomic index.html writes, no-store script cache headers, robust uninstall.
